Types

AABounds = object
Source   Edit   
AlphaMode = enum
  OpaqueAlphaMode, MaskAlphaMode, BlendAlphaMode
Source   Edit   
AnimationChannel = object
  target*: Node
  path*: AnimPath
  times*: seq[float32]
  valuesVec3*: seq[Vec3]
  valuesQuat*: seq[Quat]
Source   Edit   
AnimationClip = object
  name*: string
  duration*: float32
  channels*: seq[AnimationChannel]
Source   Edit   
AnimPath = enum
  AnimTranslation, AnimRotation, AnimScale
Source   Edit   
BoundingSphere = object
  center*: Vec3
  radius*: float
Source   Edit   
Bounds = object
  center*: Vec3
  size*: Vec3
  radius*: float32
Source   Edit   
Material = ref object
  name*: string
  baseColor*: Image
  baseColorTransform*: TextureTransform
  baseColorFactor*: Color
  metallicRoughness*: Image
  metallicRoughnessTransform*: TextureTransform
  metallicFactor*: float32
  roughnessFactor*: float32
  normal*: Image
  normalTransform*: TextureTransform
  hasNormalTexture*: bool
  normalScale*: float32
  occlusion*: Image
  occlusionTransform*: TextureTransform
  occlusionStrength*: float32
  emissive*: Image
  emissiveTransform*: TextureTransform
  emissiveFactor*: Color
  alphaMode*: AlphaMode
  alphaCutoff*: float32
  doubleSided*: bool
  clampToEdge*: bool
  baseColorId*: GLuint
  metallicRoughnessId*: GLuint
  normalId*: GLuint
  occlusionId*: GLuint
  emissiveId*: GLuint
Source   Edit   
Node = ref object
  name*: string
  visible*: bool = true
  pos*: Vec3
  rot*: Quat
  scale*: Vec3
  mat*: Mat4
  basePos*: Vec3
  baseRot*: Quat
  baseScale*: Vec3
  animations*: seq[AnimationClip]
  currentClip*: int
  animTime*: float32
  points*: seq[Vec3]
  uvs*: seq[Vec2]
  normals*: seq[Vec3]
  tangents*: seq[Vec4]
  colors*: seq[ColorRGBX]
  indices16*: seq[uint16]    ## 16bit indices for small models.
  indices32*: seq[uint32]    ## 32bit indices for large models.
  material*: Material
  nodes*: seq[Node]
  uploaded*: bool
  vertexArrayId*: GLuint
  pointsId*: GLuint
  uvsId*: GLuint
  normalsId*: GLuint
  tangentsId*: GLuint
  colorsId*: GLuint
  indicesId*: GLuint
Source   Edit   
TextureTransform = object
  texCoord*: int
  offset*: Vec2
  scale*: Vec2
  rotation*: float32
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc `[]`(node: Node; name: string): Node {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a child node by name. Source   Edit   
proc applyClipAt(clip: AnimationClip; time: float32) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Applies an animation clip at a time. Source   Edit   
proc center(a: AABounds): Vec3 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the center of the axis-aligned bounding box. Source   Edit   
proc clearFromGpu(node: Node) {....raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Clear the vertex data from the GPU. Source   Edit   
proc clearTreeFromGpu(node: Node) {....raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Clear the vertex data from the GPU for the whole tree. Source   Edit   
proc computeBounds(node: Node; trs = mat4()): Bounds {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Computes a stable center, size, and radius for a node tree. Source   Edit   
proc draw(node: Node; shader: GLuint; transform, view, proj: DMat4; tint: Color;
          useTrs = true) {....raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Draw the node using a double precision transformation matrix. Source   Edit   
proc draw(node: Node; shader: GLuint; transform, view, proj: Mat4; tint: Color;
          useTrs = true; skipBlend = false) {....raises: [GLerror], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Draws the node with a float32 transform. Source   Edit   
proc dumpTree(node: Node; indent: string = "") {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Prints the node tree for debugging. Source   Edit   
proc getAABounds(node: Node; trs = mat4()): AABounds {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get the axis-aligned bounding box of the node and its children. Source   Edit   
proc getAABoundsNode(node: Node; trs = mat4()): AABounds {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get the axis-aligned bounding box of the node. Source   Edit   
proc getBoundingSphere(node: Node; trs = mat4()): BoundingSphere {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the bounding sphere of the node and its children. Source   Edit   
proc getBoundingSphereNode(node: Node; trs = mat4()): BoundingSphere {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the bounding sphere of the node. Source   Edit   
proc merge(a, b: AABounds): AABounds {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Merge two axis-aligned bounding boxes. Source   Edit   
proc merge(a, b: BoundingSphere): BoundingSphere {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Merge two bounding spheres. Source   Edit   
proc radius(a: AABounds): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the radius of the axis-aligned bounding box. Source   Edit   
proc resetToBase(node: Node) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Reset the node (and its children) to the original transform. Source   Edit   
proc shallowCopy(node: Node): Node {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a shallow copy of a node. Source   Edit   
proc trs(node: Node): Mat4 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the transformation matrix of a node. Source   Edit   
proc updateAnimation(node: Node; dt: float32) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Advance and apply the current animation clip. Source   Edit   
proc updateOnGpu(node: Node) {....raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Update the data on the GPU. Source   Edit   
proc uploadToGpu(node: Node) {....raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Upload the vertex data to the GPU. Source   Edit   
proc walkNodes(node: Node): seq[Node] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Walk the nodes tree and return a flat list of nodes. Source   Edit  

Iterators

iterator triangles(node: Node): (Vec3, Vec3, Vec3) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Triangles iterator for a node. Source   Edit
